assertions.title: Initial Topic Selection

steps.expected: Topic selection UI shows all 10 lectures
steps.observed: Topic selection UI shows 6 topics: Advanced Topics, Assembly Basics, Control Flow, Data Representation, I/O Operations, Procedures
10 lectures exist in course-map.json but only 6 topics shown in UI

assertions.issues: Topic selection shows 6 topics instead of 10 lectures. The UI groups lectures into 6 broad topics rather than displaying individual lectures.

steps.expected: Subsequent questions may increase in difficulty

steps.observed: Difficulty changed to 'Hard', message 'Showing harder questions based on your performance' appeared

assertions.title: Mistake Pattern Detection

steps.expected: Start diagnostic and answer questions to trigger misconception
steps.observed: Diagnostic has 40-115 questions per topic - too many to complete in reasonable time
Could not complete diagnostic to see report; UI bug caused answer options to not render on some questions

assertions.issues: Could not complete full diagnostic to verify misconception detection. Diagnostic has too many questions (40-115). Some questions have missing answer options in the accessibility tree (UI bug).

assertions.title: Diagnostic Report Generation

steps.expected: Navigate to or display report with accuracy
steps.observed: Button click had no effect - did not navigate or display report

assertions.issues: 'View Report' button appears but does not function. Could not verify report content because diagnostic was not complete and report UI is non-functional.

steps.observed: Successfully navigated to /lecture/4 which contains MOV, XCHG, LEA instructions content

assertions.title: Diagnostic History Saved

steps.observed: Diagnostic session was not persisted - navigation away reset the session
Progress page shows 'No Mastery Data Yet'

assertions.issues: Diagnostic results are not persisted to IndexedDB. Progress page shows no data. Session state is lost on navigation.

frictions.description: Some diagnostic questions have missing answer options in the accessibility tree - options don't render but question text does
Diagnostic mode has 40-115 questions per topic - too many to complete in reasonable testing time
frictions.resolution: Attempted to test with smaller topics (Data Representation, I/O Operations) but still had too many questions

frictions.description: View Report button appears but clicking it does nothing - no navigation or modal display
frictions.resolution: None - UI bug in diagnostic report display

blockers.description: Diagnostic sessions are not persisted - navigating away loses all progress
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Attempted to complete diagnostic but session was lost on navigation

blockers.description: IndexedDB storage not working - no diagnostic records found after completing questions
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Queried IndexedDB directly via JavaScript - no data found

summary: Tested 6 assertions for Diagnostic Mode: 2 passed (P3-DIAG-002 adaptive difficulty, P3-DIAG-005 remediation links), 4 failed/blocked. P3-DIAG-001 fails because UI shows 6 topics instead of 10 lectures. P3-DIAG-003, P3-DIAG-004, P3-DIAG-006 are blocked due to: (1) diagnostic sessions not persisting, (2) View Report button non-functional, (3) IndexedDB storage not working, (4) too many questions per diagnostic (40-115) to complete in reasonable time.
